name: 易混词辨析 · 第二辑（花费 / 到达 / 看听 / 形容词）
desc: 中考高频易混词第二弹：spend/cost/take/pay、reach/arrive/get to、look/see/watch/read、hear/listen to、interesting/interested、hard/hardly、alone/lonely。配对记义 + 句境选词。免费档。

m1: v. 花费（人作主语：spend time/money on sth 或 (in) doing）
v. 花费（物作主语：sth costs sb money）
v. 花费（it takes sb time to do sth）
v. 付钱（pay (sb) money for sth）
v. 到达（及物，reach + 地点，后不加介词）
v. 到达（不及物，arrive at 小地点 / in 大地点）
m2: v. 看（强调动作，look at sth）
v. 看见（强调结果，无意中看到）
v. 观看（看一段时间，watch TV / a match）
v. 看 / 读（书报杂志）
v. 听见（强调结果，hear sb do/doing）
m3: adj. 有趣的（修饰物 / 事）
adj. 感兴趣的（修饰人，be interested in）
adv. 努力地；adj. 困难的 / 硬的
adv. 几乎不（含否定意义）
adj./adv. 独自（= by oneself，客观、无感情）
adj. 孤独的（有感情色彩）

m4.q: It ___ me two hours to finish the homework last night.
m4.why: 句型 it takes sb time to do sth → took；spend 人作主语，cost 物作主语。

m4.q: The new mobile phone ___ him three thousand yuan.
m4.why: 物(phone)作主语：sth costs sb money → cost；spend/pay 人作主语。

m4.q: He ___ three thousand yuan on the new mobile phone.
m4.why: 人作主语：spend money on sth → spent；cost 物作主语。

m4.q: We ___ Shanghai at nine o'clock in the morning.
m4.why: reach 及物，后直接接地点 → reached；arrive 需 at/in，got 需 to。

m4.q: What time did you ___ the airport yesterday?
m4.why: get to + 地点 → get to；reach 不接 to，arrive 接 at（airport 用 at，非 in）。

m4.q: How much did you ___ for the concert ticket?
m4.why: pay for sth（为……付钱）→ pay；cost/take 物或 it 作主语。

m5.q: Look! The boys ___ a basketball match over there.
m5.why: 观看比赛用 watch；see 强调“看见”结果，look 强调动作(look at)，read 是读书报。

m5.q: Be quiet! I ___ someone knocking at the door.
m5.why: “听见”(结果)用 hear，常与 can 连用、不用进行时；listen to 强调动作。

m5.q: The science fiction is so ___ that I have read it twice.
m5.why: 修饰物/事用 -ing 形容词 interesting；interested 修饰人(be interested in)。

m5.q: After his best friend moved away, he often felt ___ at home.
m5.why: lonely 表“孤独”(情感)；alone 只表“独自”(客观状态)。

m5.q: Jack works very ___, so he always does well in exams.
m5.why: hard 作副词意为“努力地”；hardly 是“几乎不”，意思相反。

m5.q: It rained heavily, so ___ anyone came to the sports meeting.
m5.why: hardly anyone = 几乎没人（否定）；hard 是“努力/困难”，nearly/almost anyone 不合语义。
